title: Created Mess
description: A small-ish modpack focused around the Create mod
body:
Decided to throw this pack up here on Modrinth to make it easier for people to download when I update the pack.

### A few things to note:

- The pack has Simple Voice Chat installed meaning there's a proximity chat in game. Kolbi and I have messed around with it a bit and it seems to also work with the Sound Physics mod, which is great fun.
- Create is (obviously) a big focus of the pack, so there are quite a few addon mods installed. The main ones being:
  - Create: New Age which adds power generation and other exciting stuff.
  - Create Deco which as the name implies, adds a lot of decoration based blocks that works with Create.
  - Create: Steam 'n' Rails which expands on the railway system in the base mod, adding different wood variants to the rails and also wider tracks.
  - Create Slice & Dice which adds a lot of ways to automate different farms and food production. Also has integration with Farmers' Delight!
